description: county seat of Jefferson County, Kentucky, United States
description_wiki: Louisville is the most populous city in the U.S. state of Kentucky, sixth-most populous city in the Southeast, and the 27th-most-populous city in the United States.

description: air service branch of the United States Armed Forces
description_wiki: The United States Air Force (USAF) is the air service branch of the United States Armed Forces.

description: United States Army post in Kentucky, United States
description_wiki: Fort Knox is a United States Army installation in Kentucky, south of Louisville and north of Elizabethtown.

description: census designated place in Texas, United States
description_wiki: Fort Bliss is a United States Army post in New Mexico and Texas, with its headquarters in El Paso, Texas.

description: city in Warrick County, Indiana, United States
description_wiki: Newburgh is an incorporated town in Ohio Township, Warrick County, Indiana, United States, along the Ohio River.

description: 1939–1945 global conflict
description_wiki: World War II, or the Second World War (1 September 1939 – 2 September 1945), was a global conflict between two coalitions: the Allies and the Axis powers.

description: 1944 one of the five sectors of the Allied invasion of German-occupied France
description_wiki: Omaha Beach was one of five Allied beach landing sectors of the amphibious assault component of Operation Overlord during the Second World War.

description: 1944 landing operations of the Allied invasion of Normandy
description_wiki: The Normandy landings were the landing operations and associated airborne operations on 6 June 1944 of the Allied invasion of Normandy in Operation Overlord during the Second World War.

description: country in Western Europe
description_wiki: Luxembourg,  officially the Grand Duchy of Luxembourg, is a landlocked country in Western Europe.

description: country in Central Europe
description_wiki: Germany, officially the Federal Republic of Germany, is a country in Western and Central Europe.

armed conflict in Vietnam, Laos, and Cambodia between North Vietnam and South Vietnam, from 1955 to 1975
description_wiki: The Vietnam War (1 November 1955 – 30 April 1975) was an armed conflict in Vietnam, Laos, and Cambodia fought between North Vietnam (Democratic Republic of Vietnam) and South Vietnam (Republic of Vietnam) and their allies.

city and county seat of Alameda County, California, United States
description_wiki: Oakland is a city in the East Bay region of the San Francisco Bay Area in the U.S. state of California.

description: county seat of Vanderburgh County, Indiana, United States
description_wiki: Evansville is a city in Vanderburgh County, Indiana, United States, and its county seat.

description: city in and county seat of Brown County, Wisconsin, United States
description_wiki: Green Bay is a city in Brown County, Wisconsin, United States, and its county seat.

description: airport in Chicago, Illinois, United States
description_wiki: Chicago O'Hare International Airport (IATA: ORD, ICAO: KORD, FAA LID: ORD) is the primary international airport serving Chicago, Illinois, United States, located on the city's Northwest Side, approximately 17 miles (27 km) northwest of downtown.

description: military airfield in Vietnam
description_wiki: Bien Hoa Air Base (Vietnamese: Sân bay Biên Hòa) is a Vietnam Air Defence - Air Force (VN ADAF) military airfield located in South-Central southern Vietnam about 25 km (16 miles) from Ho Chi Minh City,  across the Dong Nai river in the northern ward of Tân Phong, and within the city of Biên Hòa within Đồng Nai Province.

city of Vietnam, capital of the Khánh Hòa Province
description_wiki: Nha Trang (English:  or ; Vietnamese: [ɲaː1 t͡ɕaːŋ1] ) is a coastal city and the former capital of Khánh Hòa Province, on the South Central Coast of Vietnam.
